name: ACE Cash Express
description_short: ACE Cash Express provides small emergency loans, title loans, check cashing, and financial services with same-day or next-day funding through physical store locations.
description_long: ACE Cash Express is an established financial services company operating multiple physical store locations across the United States, offering a range of short-term lending and cash access products. The company has been serving consumers seeking quick access to funds for emergency expenses and unexpected financial needs. ACE offers a diverse product suite including installment loans, title loans, check cashing, bill payment services, money transfers, tax services, and online loan options to serve different customer financial situations. The company maintains a national footprint with store locators and customer service support, though availability of specific products varies by state and location—as evidenced by service restrictions noted on their site. ACE positions itself as a convenience-based lender for consumers unable to access traditional banking products, with emphasis on speed of funding and accessibility through physical locations. However, like all emergency cash lenders, the company operates in a highly regulated space with significant variation in what services can be offered state-by-state, which limits product availability in certain jurisdictions.
pros: Multiple product options beyond payday loans including title loans, installment loans, and check cashing
National presence with many physical store locations for in-person service
Same-day or next-day funding available on emergency loans
Online loan application option for digital-first customers
Established customer service with dedicated phone lines and email support
Additional financial services like bill payments, money transfers, and tax services available
Business services offerings expand utility beyond personal consumer needs
cons: Specific APR and fee information not disclosed on the available website content, preventing transparent cost comparison
Website navigation issues and 404 errors on location-specific pages suggest inconsistent digital infrastructure
Service availability is highly state-dependent with some loan types unavailable in certain states like Colorado
No mention of credit-building features or financial counseling to help customers avoid repeat borrowing cycles
Physical store dependency may limit accessibility for rural consumers or those with mobility constraints
best_for: Consumers with immediate cash emergencies needing same-day or next-day funding
Those who own vehicles and can leverage title loans for larger emergency amounts
Customers who prefer in-person service interactions at physical store locations
Individuals needing bundled services like check cashing, bill payments, and money transfers
diagnosis: ACE Cash Express is appropriate for consumers facing genuine emergencies who need fast funding and have access to a physical location or prefer in-person service. The primary caveat is that availability varies significantly by state and product type, so customers should verify what services are actually available in their location before applying, and should carefully review APR and fee terms (not visible on provided website content) before committing to any loan.

cfpb_data.cfpb_company_name: Populus Financial Group, Inc. (F/K/A Ace Cash Express)
